description: Content manifest for the untracked (embargoed) slate telemetry panel and its companion summary. Records compression- and reorder-independent content hashes so every panel-derived quantity is verifiable from committed state. Remedies the root gap identified in DEVIATIONS D-16/D-17 (no committed manifest recorded any panel hash) and the uncommitted-provenance finding D-18. The panel files themselves remain untracked/embargoed; only these hashes are public. Released panels will verify against these hashes on embargo lift.

registration_pin.slate_panel_sha256_ea972e2e: the registered quantity is the DECOMPRESSED-content SHA-256 (ea972e2e…), NOT the gzip container hash; the live panel's decompressed bytes match it in full (see decompressed_sha256 below)

hash_conventions.gzip_container_sha256: SHA-256 of the .csv.gz bytes as stored; NON-reproducible across writes because pandas to_csv(compression='gzip') embeds a build mtime in the gzip header. Not a registered quantity.
hash_conventions.decompressed_sha256: SHA-256 of the decompressed CSV bytes; reproducible; equals the registration §4 pin.
hash_conventions.canonical_content_sha256: SHA-256 of: header line + rows sorted by (user_id, step), each row comma-joined verbatim, newline-separated. Reproducible under any re-compression AND any row reordering.

provenance_column_constancy.note: R3 corroboration — verified constant across all 1,093,072 rows of the slate panel and matched to the frozen contract.

census_reproducibility.note: R4 closing verification — the clean-control census anchored at commit 6b6ac55 (STUDY2_CENSUS.sha256) re-derives BYTE-IDENTICALLY from this content-verified panel under the anchored label-side logic (population.fold, frontier floor 10, window 20, starve-window (20,50]).

panels.role: Study-2 analysis input (config.PANEL / C.PANEL); the registered slate panel (registration §4). Untracked/embargoed.

companion_artifacts.role: slate-relog run summary (records contract/engine/freeze hashes). Untracked/embargoed.

generated_by: compute_telemetry.py write_panel() (line ~679), pandas to_csv(compression='gzip'); slate columns added by the +5-line change committed under DEVIATIONS D-18.
